personalInfo.title: Personal details
personalInfo.emailHint: The email address is tied to your account and cannot be changed here.

display.title: Display
display.themeHint: Affects the whole app immediately. Saved on your device.
display.languageHint: Affects the whole app immediately. Saved to your account.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emailDescription: Get an email for important events in your account.
notifications.weeklyDescription: A summary of your applications and new job ads.

privacy.title: Privacy and data
privacy.description: You have the right to export all data we hold about you, and to delete your account entirely.
privacy.exportTitle: The export flow is not enabled yet

logout.title: Log out
logout.description: End this session. You can log in again at any time.

matchPrefs.title: Matching
matchPrefs.intro: Enter the occupations, regions and employment types you are looking for. We use it to show how well each job ad matches your profile. All fields are optional.
matchPrefs.degraded: Your matching choices could not be loaded right now. Try reloading the page in a moment.
matchPrefs.saveError: The change could not be saved. Try again.

dialog.title: Add to matching
dialog.intro: Search and select occupations, regions and employment types. Selected ones appear at the top of each part. Remove them with the cross icon.

occupation.filterHint: Type to narrow the list, or browse by occupational area.
occupation.noMatch: No occupational group matches the filter.
occupation.fieldsUnavailable: The occupational areas could not be loaded right now.
occupation.chooseField: Choose an occupational area on the left.
occupation.noCvBody: Upload a CV and we can suggest occupations based on your experience. You decide which suggestions to include.
occupation.noRole: We could not read an occupation from your CV. You can choose occupations from the list instead.
occupation.unauthorized: You are not logged in. Log in and try again.
occupation.error: Could not read your CV right now. Try again in a moment.

wizard.introOccupations: Choose the occupations you are looking for. We suggest based on your CV. Change them if they are not right; you decide which ones to include.
wizard.introRegions: Choose the regions you want to work in. Leave empty for the whole country.
wizard.introEmployment: Choose the employment types you are open to. Leave empty for all.
wizard.introReview: Review your choices. You can remove something here, or go back to change it.

errors.saveFailed: Could not save your matching preferences.
errors.network: Could not reach the server. Check your network connection.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Wait a moment and try again.
errors.suggestFailed: Could not fetch suggestions right now. Try again in a moment.

account.displayNameHint: The name shown in the app and on your applications.
account.emailNotificationsHint: Get an email for important events in your account.
account.weeklySummaryHint: A weekly overview of your active applications.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.description: You can delete your account permanently. The action cannot be undone and logs you out from all devices.

delete.title: Delete account permanently
delete.description: This action cannot be undone. Your account and all linked data will be deleted. You will be logged out immediately after the deletion is complete.
delete.confirmEmailLabel: Enter your email address to confirm

errors.network: Could not reach the server. Check your network connection.
errors.emailMismatch: The email address does not match your account.

onboarding.uploadIntro: Upload your CV and we can suggest which occupations you are looking for. You decide what to include, and you can skip this.
onboarding.cvUploadedNote: We have read and interpreted your CV. Nothing has changed and no matching has been done yet. Would you like to set up your matching profile now?
onboarding.setUpMatchNote: Would you like to set up your matching now? It takes a minute. You can skip and do it later.
